tasks.task: Implement universal location detection for prayer times
tasks.details: Added automatic geolocation detection, timezone auto-detection, location persistence in localStorage, and graceful fallback to Cairo coordinates. Prayer times now work globally instead of being hardcoded to Cairo.

tasks.task: Add location display in Islamic Information section
tasks.details: Added a location info section to the Islamic Information card that displays the user's current location and allows clicking to change location.
Implemented comprehensive location selection with global city search (OpenStreetMap API), manual coordinate input, preset Islamic cities, and automatic timezone detection for any location worldwide.

tasks.task: Fix location display to show actual city names
tasks.details: Updated location display logic to prioritize showing the actual selected city name from user input instead of extracting city names from timezone strings.

tasks.task: Optimize location detection for VS Code webviews
tasks.details: Implemented graceful fallback system since geolocation is blocked in VS Code webviews, with user-friendly manual location selection as the primary method.

tasks.task: Implement IP-based automatic location detection from extension backend
tasks.details: Replaced browser geolocation with IP-based geolocation from extension host using ip-api.com API. Added getUserLocation() function, message passing between webview and extension, and automatic location detection without user permissions or CORS issues.

tasks.task: Move prayer time calculations from external server to extension backend using Adhan library
tasks.details: Eliminated server dependency by implementing prayer calculations directly in extension host using Adhan library. Added calculatePrayerTimes() function, message handling for 'requestPrayerTimes', and updated prayerTracker.js to communicate with extension instead of localhost server.

tasks.task: Fix VS Code API acquisition conflict in webview components
tasks.details: Resolved 'An instance of the VS Code API has already been acquired' error by modifying PrayerTrackerComponent constructor to accept vscode instance as parameter instead of trying to acquire it again. Updated activityBar.js to pass the vscode instance to the component.

tasks.task: Clean up console output by handling prayer tracker messages in activityBar.js
tasks.details: Added cases for 'receiveLocation', 'receivePrayerTimes', and 'locationError' messages in activityBar.js handleMessage method to prevent 'Unknown message type' console warnings.

tasks.task: Clean up server to keep only health check endpoint
tasks.details: Removed Islamic API endpoints from server (hijri-date, next-prayer) since calculations moved to extension. Kept only health check endpoint for monitoring. Removed unused API files and updated package.json.

tasks.task: Add What's New modal that shows once per user with features from new_features.txt
tasks.details: Created dynamic 'What's New' modal that loads content from new_features.txt file. Modal shows once per user using localStorage, displays recent updates and coming soon features for CodeTune v0.0.7.

tasks.task: Add custom SVG icon with Islamic crescent design
tasks.details: Created custom SVG icon featuring coding brackets with glowing Islamic crescent moon dot. Icon combines code identity with Islamic symbolism and uses gradient colors for visual appeal in VS Code activity bar.

tasks.task: Remove Advanced Settings section (cache, timeout, retry settings)
tasks.details: Removed Advanced Settings section from settings UI and corresponding configuration properties from package.json to simplify user experience and remove technical complexity.
Committed all v0.0.7 changes, created annotated git tag v0.0.7, and pushed both commit and tag to GitHub repository. Ready for VS Code Marketplace publishing.

tasks.task: Update CHANGELOG.md for version 0.0.7 with serverless architecture changes
tasks.details: Documented the major architectural changes including server removal, Adhan library integration, IP-based location detection, and extension-only operation in CHANGELOG.md with comprehensive details.

tasks.task: Create GitHub release for v0.0.7 using GitHub CLI
tasks.details: Created comprehensive GitHub release with detailed release notes, feature highlights, and links to full changelog. Release is now available at https://github.com/kareem2099/codetune/releases/tag/v0.0.7

tasks.task: Publish CodeTune v0.0.7 to VS Code Marketplace
tasks.details: Successfully published CodeTune v0.0.7 to VS Code Marketplace using new PAT. Extension is now live at https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=FreeRave.codetune and available for download by users worldwide.
